channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
item.description: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

item.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 at a steep discount to its top model as the company races toward a blockbuster IPO
item.description: Anthropic today released Claude Sonnet 5, a new AI model that the company says delivers near-flagship performance at mid-tier prices — a move designed to give cost-conscious enterprise developers access to powerful agentic capabilities just as the San Francisco-based AI lab barrels toward an initial public offering that will test whether the private market's staggering AI valuations can survive public scrutiny.The release, which Anthropic describes as "the most agentic Sonnet model yet," makes Sonnet 5 the default model for users on Anthropic's Free and Pro plans, while also making it availabl...

item.title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
item.description: Startup Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. Its new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

item.title: Moto’s Tag 2 tracker is $20 for a limited time
item.description: Announced at CES 2026, the Moto Tag 2 has finally arrived in the US. The Bluetooth tracker with improved battery life over its predecessor, plus UWB sensing for more accurate tracking, is available through Motorola’s site at a special $19.99 launch price (originally $29.99). There are plenty of trackers for Android owners to consider, but […]

item.title: Petits colis Shein, Temu, AliExpress : la France abandonne ses 2 € dès demain, l’Europe impose 3 €
item.description: La taxe française de 2 € sur les petits colis disparaît dès ce 1er juillet, quatre mois après son lancement. À la place, un droit de douane européen de 3 € : pour vos commandes Shein ou Temu, le surcoût reste là.

item.title: Vendredi 13 avril 2029, un astéroïde va passer entre la Terre et certains de nos satellites !
item.description: C’est certain, le 13 avril 2029, tous les regards de tourneront vers le ciel. Un astéroïde aussi grand que la tour Eiffel frôlera la Terre à une distance inférieure à celle de nombreux satellites géostationnaires. Un spectacle aussi fascinant qu'historique… Mais y a-t-il quelque chose à...

item.title: A Spotify user just found a way to make it look like Apple Music — but there's something about it that doesn't sit right with me
item.description: There's a hidden smartphone setting that lets you view Spotify in light mode, but it's a real eyesore.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro : les vidéos de test de chute supprimées de X après une fuite chez un fournisseur d’Apple
item.description: Des vidéos montrant un iPhone 18 Pro en plein test de chute ont fui sur X avant d’être supprimées. Elles viennent d’une cyberattaque massive chez un fournisseur d’Apple.

item.title: 'We were given a challenge which is unprecedented for the game': I spoke to Lenovo’s Ken Wong about the challenges of being "the technology backbone of FIFA" and how the FIFA World Cup 2026 can help democratize AI for everyone
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 isn’t just the biggest tournament in the world, it can play a vital role in democratizing AI, Lenovo’s Ken Wong tells us.

item.title: Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
item.description: A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka's The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some Glasgow-style AI fakes, the voiceover is AI-generated. Deadline […]

item.title: Cet ingénieur repousse les limites de l’e-ink en y faisant tourner une Game Boy à 60 Hz
item.description: Un ingénieur a transformé une carte acec écran e-ink en une Game Boy qui tourne à 60 images par seconde.

item.title: This San Diego charter school bought $500,000 worth of humanoid robots for the classroom
item.description: Altus Schools says the robots will help students learn. Critics are asking why an AI teaching experiment needed to look human. The newest teacher at San Diego charter school chain Altus Schools stands 6’2″, has bright blue eyes, and a bald head. It is also a robot.

item.title: Chine | Dévoilement de robots humanoïdes à l'apparence hyperréaliste
item.description: Votre prochain confident sera-t-il un robot ? Peau souple au toucher, voix apaisante : l’entreprise chinoise UBTech a dévoilé mardi de tout nouveaux androïdes à l’apparence humaine hyperréaliste, dotés d’intelligence artificielle (IA) et présentés comme des remèdes à la solitude.

item.title: I spent a month with the Motorola Razr Plus 2026, and it's a great flip phone with a worryingly short lifespan
item.description: I tested the Motorola Razr Plus 2026 (or Razr 70 Plus), and while it boasts impressive hardware, I fear for its longevity.

item.title: This $550 Dell 15 Laptop deal genuinely surprised me — a well-rounded everyday laptop for business professionals and students, with a massive $250 off
item.description: For my money, the Dell 15 Laptop is perfectly priced for professionals and students.

item.title: How well does the Beatbot Sora 70 robot clean your pool?
item.description: CNET tests the Beatbot Sora 70 robot pool cleaner to see how well it cleans, how easy it is to use, and whether it's worth the investment.

item.title: The HP Envy 6555e is a 'slick printer' that's ideal for home and student printing — and Best Buy just dropped the price under $90
item.description: The HP Envy 6555e is half price at Best Buy right now — here's who should (and shouldn't) buy it.

item.title: The summer heat is hitting data centers hard — and outages and downtime may only get worse
item.description: More than half of the world's data center capacity is at risk of rising temperatures, heatwaves, drought and water stress.

item.title: Rockstar workers push to unionize ahead of GTA VI’s launch
item.description: Workers at Grand Theft Auto VI developer Rockstar Games have submitted a request for their union, the IWGB Game Workers Union, to be voluntarily recognized, according to a press release. The request follows Rockstar firing more than 30 staffers last year in a move accused of being "union busting." According to the release, IWGB members […]

item.title: Did RAM suppliers fix memory prices? This lawsuit says they did — but I don’t think it will fix the RAMpocalypse
item.description: A lawsuit filed against RAM suppliers says they colluded to fix memory prices in favor of HBM for AI data centers.

item.title: Google’s killing off Tenor GIF searches in other apps
item.description: The GIF-picking interfaces in some of your favorite online platforms might look different going forward, as Google prepares to shut down the Tenor API today. While the Tenor website, along with its searchable GIF library, will remain live, platforms like X, Discord, Bluesky, and WhatsApp that previously integrated the API are now having to migrate […]...

item.title: Xbox weighs canceling Blade game and shuttering Arkane
item.description: Microsoft is set to announce a wave of layoffs for its Xbox studios and employees next week. Sources familiar with Microsoft's plans tell The Verge that the layoffs will lead to studio closures or spinoffs, potential mergers of studios, and canceled games. I understand Microsoft is currently weighing closing at least five studios, including the […]

item.title: Threads adds new features to Live Chats as it expands access
item.description: The updates include translations, new tools for hosts, and more.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
item.description: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

item.title: Trouver un ultrabook robuste avec 32 Go de RAM sous les 850 € ? C’est possible chez Lenovo
item.description: Le Lenovo Yoga Slim 7 (14AKP10) est un ordinateur ultraportable mariant puissance et compacité. Il profite actuellement d'une très grosse réduction chez Amazon, s'affichant à 849,99 euros au lieu de 1 399,99 euros au lancement.

item.title: The 'fantastically compact' GMKtec M6 Ultra is our top-rated mini PC for work and study — and now the powerful 32GB/1TB configuration is $150 off at Amazon
item.description: A Ryzen 5 7640HS, dual 2.5G Ethernet, USB4, and triple 4K display support in a chassis you can tuck behind a monitor.

item.title: How to maximize your IRA according to life stage and tax bracket
item.description: Savvy investors know that retirement accounts aren’t static buckets. In the world of financial planning, we often treat retirement accounts as static buckets. But for the savvy investor, an IRA has a life cycle that must evolve as they do. From a teen’s first summer job to a retiree’s final legacy bequest, the optimal way to use these accounts changes based on tax bracket and life stage.By viewing retirement savings as a five-stage life cycle, investors can minimize the IRS’ take and maximize what stays in their pocket....

item.title: Not Alone trailer: Timothée Chalamet and Selena Gomez find love and aliens
item.description: Illumination's "Not Alone," featuring the voices of Timothée Chalamet and Selena Gomez, hits theaters in April of 2027.

item.title: How to save $150 or more on your next PC build at Newegg right now
item.description: Newegg’s Combo Builder quietly stacks discounts across CPUs, motherboards, RAM, GPUs, and more — here’s how to use it to your advantage

item.title: Stocker vos données en local n’a jamais été aussi abordable avec ce bon plan chez Amazon
item.description: Besoin de centraliser et sécuriser l'ensemble de vos fichiers à la maison sans dépendre du cloud ? Le serveur NAS Ugreen DXP2800 à deux baies s'affiche actuellement à 299,99 euros au lieu de 369,99 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: I found two unmissable MSI monitor deals that give you loads more screen space for getting the job done in style
item.description: Stop squinting at a single small screen—grab a reliable 27-inch everyday display for your secondary tasks or dive straight into a 34-inch ultrawide workstation that completely replaces a dual-monitor setup.

item.title: Forget the Dacia Spring — Leapmotor doubles its EV grant to offer Britain's cheapest new car for just £12,995
item.description: Leapmotor cuts T03 price to under £13K, making it the UK's cheapest new car.

item.title: Which AI chatbot is right for you? Take our quiz to find out whether ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok or Perplexity is best
item.description: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini and Grok all have different strengths. Here's how to find the one that best matches the way you work.

item.title: Hermes Agent, l’agent IA de Nous Research qui apprend de ses erreurs : à quoi ça sert, comment l’installer et quel modèle choisir
item.description: Hermes Agent ne se contente pas d'exécuter des tâches, il apprend de chacune, écrit ses propres compétences et s'améliore tout seul au fil de l'usage. Conçu par Nous Research, il arrive dans le sillage d'OpenClaw et grimpe vite, sur un autre terrain : la mémoire et l'apprentissage.

item.title: Physical copies of GTA 6 are flying off the shelves despite the download code controversy
item.description: GTA is currently a top seller for multiple retailers after pre-orders began, including the physical edition, despite the game's download code controversy.

item.title: Le dernier casque de Sony, presque parfait, profite des soldes d’été pour perdre près de 100 euros sur son prix
item.description: En cas de voyages en avion ou en train, le bruit environnant peut être dérangeant. Un problème résolu grâce au Sony WH-1000XM6 et son excellente réduction de bruit, actuellement en promotion chez Amazon.

item.title: Google's Gemini Omni Flash hits the API, turning enterprise video production into a conversation
item.description: For most enterprises, a 90-second training video or a product explainer has never been an easy ask. It means a well planned brief, an internal film crew or an outside vendor, a shoot, an edit, and a round of revisions. Change one line of on-screen text due to a legal review and the whole chain runs again. The cost and the long time lines are why so much internal video never gets made.That equation is what Google is aiming to rewrite with Gemini Omni Flash, the first model in its new "Omni" family, now rolling out to developers and enterprise customers through an API after debuting to consumers...

item.title: From ISP to DNS and VPNs: Rightsholders must be liable for collateral damage in piracy blocking, European ISP group says
item.description: EuroISPA has submitted a formal complaint to the European Commission, warning that aggressive anti-piracy blocking is causing massive collateral damage and urging liability for copyright holders when innocent sites are forced offline.

item.title: Godox's $29 camera also works as a light meter — as a film photographer, I'm buying
item.description: I love the idea of a pocketable light meter that's also a camera, and at this price... I'm tempted.

item.title: Scientists want you to read their research papers—so they’re using gen AI to turn them into TikTok videos
item.description: A new ‘PaperTok’ AI tool is turning dense, time-consuming academic scholarship into short, 45-second science clips for a general audience. A new AI tool is turning dense, time-consuming academic research papers into short, 45-second TikTok science videos for a general audience.

item.title: Ford is recalling 740,000 vehicles that could roll away while parked: See a list of affected models, years, and more
item.description: In total, five different vehicles are included in the recall, with production dates ranging from 2017 to 2021. Here’s what to know. The Ford Motor Company has initiated a massive recall of more than 740,000 vehicles. The issue with the affected automobiles is a defect that could cause them to roll away while parked, potentially damaging property or injuring people. Here’s what you need to know about the Ford recall....

item.title: California bill to preserve online games fails committee vote
item.description: At least for this session, the Stop Killing Games campaign has hit a wall in the California Senate.

item.title: 94 km/h au test de l’élan : l’astuce controversée de la nouvelle Aistaland GT7
item.description: Aistaland, la marque née de la coentreprise entre Huawei et GAC, s'est autoproclamée reine du test de l'élan avec sa GT7 électrique. Sauf que la voiture a freiné toute seule pendant l'épreuve, faussant les résultats. Triche, ou simple exploitation d'une zone grise des règles ?

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S26+ is free right now with T-Mobile — how to qualify for this promo
item.description: How to get a free Samsung Galaxy S26+ from T-Mobile.

item.title: Blue Origin still doesn’t know why its New Glenn rocket blew up last month
item.description: But the company is still claiming that New Glenn will return to flight this year.

item.title: I vetted the 17 best deals live at the REI 4th of July sale
item.description: The REI 4th of July sale takes up to 50% off top brands like Yeti, REI gear, Hest, Coleman, and more.

item.title: Xbox au bord d’une nouvelle vague de licenciements, les salariés organisent la riposte
item.description: Chez Xbox, on attend le couperet. Microsoft s'apprête à licencier en masse dans sa division jeux vidéo, et pour la première fois, des syndicats organisent la riposte avant même l'annonce.

item.title: Google unveils Nano Banana 2 Lite aka Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite for low cost, 4-second fast enterprise image generations
item.description: Google is upgrading its AI image generation capabilities today with the debut of Nano Banana 2 (NB2) Lite, an optimized model built for rapid execution and tight infrastructure budgets. Technically designated as Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Image on Google's application programming interface (API), NB2 Lite is positioned as the fastest and most cost-effective option within Google's creative model family, capable of generating images in 4 seconds at a flat rate of $0.034 per 1,000 images. It's available immediately to enterprise developers through Google AI Studio, the Gemini API, and the Gemini Enter...

item.title: The Bose Soundlink Max is $120 off ahead of the July 4th weekend
item.description: The Bose Soundlink Max is usually $399, but has been on steep discount this week at Amazon, Best Buy, and directly from Bose for $279. This Bluetooth speaker has a big and bold sound, with a wide soundstage that impressed us in our review. It’s great for the outdoors thanks to its IP67 rating, meaning […]

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 : un nouvel écran repéré pour corriger son pire défaut ?
item.description: Un nouvel écran LCD pour la Switch 2 a fuité sur un site de revente chinois. De quoi régler enfin le ghosting qui plombe la console depuis son lancement ? Rien n'est sûr, mais l'indice est sérieux.

item.title: Meccha Chameleon: Xbox and phone release plans, where you can try it now
item.description: Meccha Chameleon is an indie hit, but has no plans to release for Xbox or PlayStation

item.title: Soldes Amazon : une deuxième chance de faire de bonnes affaires après le Prime Day
item.description: Après le Prime Day, Amazon se lance dans les soldes d'été. Le géant du e-commerce prolonge les festivités avec une nouvelle vague de promotions sur la Tech. La bonne nouvelle ? Ces offres sont accessibles à tous, sans abonnement. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs bons plans à saisir.
